subcodes.first_line: O Thou incomparable God! We are Thy humble servants, and Thou art the All-Glorious. We are sinners
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی دست تضرع و نیاز بساحت قدس خداوند بی انباز بلند کنید و مناجات
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for tests and difficulties, @prayer for protection, @humility; meekness; lowliness
